description_long: This is a DeWalt-branded cordless electric drill featuring a robust, ergonomic handle with a black and yellow color scheme. The drill has a prominent battery pack attached at the rear, providing cordless operation and a balanced grip. The front section houses a metallic chuck and drill bit holder, with visible mechanical components for bit attachment and release. Ventilation slots are present on the sides to prevent overheating during extended use. The body is primarily constructed from durable plastic with rubberized grip areas for comfort and control. The trigger button and additional control switches are integrated into the handle for easy access during operation.
description: A DeWalt cordless electric drill with a black and yellow ergonomic handle, visible battery pack, and metallic chuck. Features include ventilation slots and a trigger button for operation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic chuck, drill bit holder, and DeWalt branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ergonomic handle, battery pack, ventilation slots, and trigger button.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery pack and the back of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle, battery pack, and additional side details.
